verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, Son of God Only You can save me Suffering on the cross You gave Your all Willingly paid the cost for me Now I am free to worship

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, You are my healer O Jesus, touch me and I will be free Lord by Your stripes I am healed O Jesus, You are my savior O Jesus, You are my strength and my shield I put my trust in Your name In Your name, Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord Your name is great A refuge I can run to A shelter from the storm A faithful friend And I can depend on You My God, my King I lift my voice and worship

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O Jesus, Jesus O Jesus, Jesus, Jesus…
